# velia Provider

Terraform provider for Velia.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "velia" {
  endpoint  = "https://www.velia.net/api/v1"
  api_token = "YOUR_API_TOKEN"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) API token for authenticating with Velia.
- `endpoint` (String) Base URL for the Velia API.
